text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from my outing with
Maruzensky...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Why's there a rent-a-car place here in the
middle of nowhere?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stares at the car rental and its array of
vehicles.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I have Tata, so I never really noticed these...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Car rentals, huh...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Bingo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! How about you rent a car and try
driving around a bit?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! How about you rent a car and try
driving around a bit?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I've been thinking that we should take a drive with you at the wheel! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I've been thinking that we should take a drive with you at the wheel! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's suggestion catches me by surprise.
I'd always assumed that she wanted to be the one
in control.
choice_data_list: You don't mind if I'm the one driving?
You don't mind if I'm the one driving?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Abisitively posolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I obviously love driving, but riding in the
passenger seat can be just as fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I first fell in love with taking drives when
my father drove us on family outings.
choice_data_list:
Did you also get your love of speed from your
father?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Bingo! I guess the apple doesn't fall far from the
tree! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I loved driving with my dad. It was like an
amusement park ride, but even more fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I even liked the traffic jams. They gave us a
chance to chat, you know?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
When you're driving with someone who's
important to you, you're happy just to be there
with them!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So that's why I'd like to let you take the wheel.
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So that's why I'd like to let you take the wheel.
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hooray! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see how you drive!
choice_data_list: (I'll take it easy and drive safe.)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer! ♪ I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer! ♪ I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VRROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! Now that's my kind of speed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Keep it in the red!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That felt so good! I loved hearing the
wind whistle as we sped forward!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's my partner! You drove like greased
lightning!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: High five!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Driving just the way Maruzensky likes it seems to
have made her very happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer! ♪ I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer! ♪ I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrrrrmm...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we're stuck in traffic. This is going to take a
while.
choice_data_list: That means we have plenty of time to talk!
That means we have plenty of time to talk!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah-ha! ♪ You were listening when I told you I like
traffic jams too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Well played! Let's rap for a while, then!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wow... It's totally dark already.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so happy we got to goof around and talk
so much. I had a great time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And you look adorable when you're concentrating
on the road... Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And you look adorable when you're concentrating
on the road... Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But it's nice to look you straight in the eyes too...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But it's nice to look you straight in the eyes too...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Maruzensky and I gaze out at the sea and
continue chatting for a while longer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer! ♪ I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer! ♪ I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrrrrmm...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I didn't realize how laid back you were. Your
driving style is the complete opposite of mine.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But... this is still kind of... relaxing...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Oh, whoopsie! I must've fallen asleep.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your driving was so smooth and gentle—it put me
right at ease.
choice_data_list: I'm glad you found it relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your driving was so smooth and gentle—it put me
right at ease.
choice_data_list: I'm glad you found it relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it was very soothing. It reminded me of
when I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Maybe it isn't so bad to go slow once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...But leave the return trip to me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll get you home at breakneck speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether slow and relaxing—or dizzyingly
fast—car rides with Maruzensky are always a
blast.
